headline: Regency Centers Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency Centers,” “Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: REG) today reported financial and operating results for the period ended March 31, 2026, and provided updated 2026 earnings guidance. For the three months ended March 31, 2026 and 2025, Net Income Attributable to Common Shareholders was $0.68 and $0.58, respectively, per diluted share.
